content:
# Gradient Flow Analysis v15

## Architecture
ResNet-152

## Flow Metrics
- Vanishing gradient score: 0.461
- Exploding gradient score: 0.738
- Effective depth: 69 layers

## Optimizations Applied
- Skip connections
- Residual connections
- Gradient clipping
- Skip connections
- Residual connections
- Attention gating

## Recommendation
Implement progressive depth training.
